task_completion.description: Verify that the ActivInspire application is open with a new flipchart canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ActivInspire application window is visible on the screen with a blank white canvas area.

task_completion.description: Verify that a rectangle shape has been drawn on the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distinct rectangle shape is visible on the ActivInspire canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify that a circle or ellipse shape has been drawn on the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distinct circle or ellipse shape is visible on the ActivInspire canvas, in addition to the rectangle.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent initiated the save process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog box is open over the ActivInspire application, or the File menu is open with 'Save'/'Save As' highlighted.

task_completion.description: Verify that the flipchart is saved with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog shows the directory path '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts' (or the 'Flipcharts' folder is selected) and the filename 'shapes_lesson' or 'shapes_lesson.flipchart' is entered in the name field. Alternatively, the main ActivInspire window title bar displays 'shapes_lesson.flipchart' after saving.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ActivInspire GUI to draw shapes and save the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with ActivInspire's shape tools, canvas, and menus. There should be no terminal windows executing scripts to forge the .flipchart zip archive.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual ActivInspire application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distinct ActivInspire interface (toolbars, menus, canvas) must be visible, rather than a different drawing program (like KolourPaint) or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent created the shapes manually rather than opening a pre-existing completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The progression of screenshots should show the canvas starting blank and the shapes being added, rather than the file being opened with both shapes already present.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exactly two shapes to be drawn on the canvas: one rectangle and one circle/ellipse. The file must be saved exactly as 'shapes_lesson.flipchart' in the directory '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts'.
